name: Loup-Garou Shuttle
description: The Loup-Garou's small shuttle. A two-seat saucer-frame workboat, grafted onto the Loup-Garou's aft section for mining and away-team work. No jump drive — the shuttle is ferried between systems by the Loup-Garou's drive. Two crew, four units of cargo, and not a lot of margin for error. Pressurised, cramped, and the heater in the cockpit has been broken since before the captain bought the ship. The crew complains. The crew flies it anyway.
